[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010011 4
1 0110100 3
2 0000000 a
3 1001001 3
4 1000011 3
5 1111110 6
6 1000000 1
7 1010000 2

01 10 1110110 5
12 21 1110011 5
23 32 1110111 6
34 43 0110100 3 match 1
45 54 1001001 3 match 3
56 65 1001011 4
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111110 6 match 5

13 31 1110100 4
24 42 1010011 4 match 0

57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1000111 4
71 17 1111110 6 match 5

47 74 1111110 6 match 5
50 05 1001111 5
61 16 1110011 5
72 27 1111111 a
